svg.title: Primus process flowcharts: the operating cycle, the crescere reproduction flow, and the invariant collapse operation

svg.text: 3 · The invariant operation — collapse / same-origin / cast
0 · Ingest path — how anything enters and leaves
Laws gated in selftest: L1 one membrane · L2 two destinations · L5 offline · L6 deterministic · L7 unbroken provenance · L-author signature bound into every hash.
